zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Oilly於1065年出生在英國奧可福爾胡可 諾頓時，他的父親Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton25歲，母親Agnes de Amic17歲。他於1120年與Edith Forne de Greystroke在英國奧可福爾班波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1141年登記服兵役。他在英國波克夏被列為high sheriff。他去世於1142年在英國波克夏享年77歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾艾斯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert d'Oilly于1065年出生在英国奧可福爾胡可 諾頓时，他的父亲Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton25岁，母亲Agnes de Amic17岁。他于1120年与Edith Forne de Greystroke在英国奧可福爾班波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1141年登记服兵役。他在英国波克夏被列为high sheriff。他去世于1142年在英国波克夏享年77岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾艾斯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: mainly Scottish variant of Irish   Daly  .
Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Dally   2, a cognate of 3 below.

variants.name: Daly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Dermot, Brigid, Aileen, Declan, Finbarr, Fintan, Aidan, Brennan, Bridie, Cathal.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dálaigh ‘descendant of Dálach’, a personal name based on dál (modern dáil) ‘meeting, assembly’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Dally   2.

variants.name: Alyea
meanings: Americanized form of French D'Ailly or Dailly . Compare Allee 2 and Elyea .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with several variants, including Allée, and the original form d'Ailly). The Huguenot ancestor was Nicolas d'Ailly, who came from France to NY c. 1682 via the Netherlands and England and died in NJ c. 1700.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Oilly was born in 1065, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton, was 25 and his mother, Agnes de Amic, was 17. He married Edith Forne de Greystroke in 1120, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1141. His occupation is listed as high sheriff in Berkshire, England. He died in 1142, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Eynsham, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Oilly est né en 1065, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Amic, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Edith Forne de Greystroke en 1120, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1141. Sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Berkshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1142, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, Unite: Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Oilly 1065 in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton 25 und seine Mutter Agnes de Amic 17. Er hat 1120 in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England Edith Forne de Greystroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1141 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als high sheriff in Berkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1142 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Berkshire, England und wurde in Eynsham, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Oilly è nato il nel 1065 nel Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Amic, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Edith Forne de Greystroke nel 1120, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1141. La sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Berkshire, England. Morì nel 1142, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Eynsham, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Oillyが1065年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンで生まれた時，父Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknortonは25歳，母Agnes de Amicは17歳であった。1120年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーでEdith Forne de Greystrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1141年に兵役登録をした。イギリスバークシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1142年にイギリスバークシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエインシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Oilly(이)가 1065년 영국 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Amic(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1120년 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 Edith Forne de Greystroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 버크실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1142년 영국 버크실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 이샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Oilly nasceu em 1065, em Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Amic, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Forne de Greystroke em 1120, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1141. Sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1142, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, Unite: Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Oilly родился в 1065 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Amic, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Forne de Greystroke в 1120 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1141 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии high sheriff в местности биркшир, Англия. Он умер в 1142 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности эиншам, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert d'Oilly nació en 1065, en Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nigel d'Oylly, Baron of Hocknorton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes de Amic, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Edith Forne de Greystroke en 1120, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1141. Su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1142, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
